
## Specialized Industry Solutions

### Hair Transplant & Medical Tourism Clinics
Target markets: Turkey (Istanbul), Thailand, Poland
Problems solved: International patient management,
WhatsApp lead chaos, multilingual consultations,
before/after photo management, international payments
Price: $8,000 - $25,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/hair-transplant-clinic-software

### Luxury Hotels & Resorts
Target markets: Maldives, Bali, UAE, Thailand
Problems solved: Manual WhatsApp guest requests,
no AI concierge, housekeeping coordination,
upselling, multi-platform booking chaos
Price: $15,000 - $60,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/hotel-ai-concierge-software

### Real Estate Agencies
Target markets: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Istanbul
Problems solved: Scattered leads, slow follow-up,
no unit inventory, manual payment plans,
Excel commission tracking, no NOC system
Price: $12,000 - $50,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/real-estate-crm-dubai

### Construction & Contracting
Target markets: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait
Problems solved: Excel project tracking,
manual subcontractor management, no procurement workflow,
Vision 2030 compliance gaps
Price: $25,000 - $150,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/construction-erp-saudi-arabia

### Logistics & Warehousing
Target markets: Germany, Canada, UAE, UK
Problems solved: WhatsApp dispatch, no fleet tracking,
spreadsheet warehouse management, manual invoicing
Price: $20,000 - $80,000
GDPR compliant for European markets
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/logistics-software-germany

### Recruitment Agencies
Target markets: UK, Canada, Australia, UAE
Problems solved: Manual CV screening,
spreadsheet pipelines, fragmented client communication
Price: $10,000 - $40,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/recruitment-agency-software

### Manufacturing SMEs
Target markets: Germany, Poland, Netherlands, Canada
Problems solved: Excel production planning,
paper quality control, no supply chain visibility
Industry 4.0 ready. GDPR compliant.
Price: €28,000 - €120,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/manufacturing-erp-germany

### Local Business Automation
Target markets: US, UK, Australia, Canada
Nail salons, gyms, clinics, restaurants, barbershops
Price: $1,500 - $8,000
Page: https://www.miractechnologies.com/small-business-automation-software
